_comment: operon-plugin hooks. PreToolUse fires pretooluse-wrapper -> pretooluse.py. Branches on tool_name inside the script: (a) Bash|Edit|Write|MultiEdit|NotebookEdit -> guardrail-rule evaluation against operon_mcp_server.rules (deny/warn/log + audit log); (b) Agent -> WA1 transcript replay (Land 5) + [OPERON IDENTITY] directive injection (Land 6/7); (c) mcp__plugin_operon-plugin_operon__{whoami,get_agent_info,get_applicable_rules} -> Land 7 teammate-rejection branch (compares session_id to the team's leadSessionId; non-lead callers get deny + a structured 'use [OPERON_QUERY] via SendMessage' reason). Land 4 removed the Stop hook block.
